title: Bright Ores - BetterVanillaBuilding addon
description: A better vanilla building addon that makes the ores light up.
body:
## Bright Ores
A BetterVanillaBuilding addon that makes the ores light up. It will make your mining experience much more beautiful!

#### BetterVanillaBuilding [Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bettervanillabuilding)
#### Offcial BetterVanillaBuilding [website](https://bettervanillabuilding.com)

Optifine is required for this pack.

Huge shout out to StefanJ2_ for making the whole Better Vanilla building Texture Pack and giving opportunities to fans to contribute to the community. 

If you are enjoying the pack tryout [darkmode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-gui) for BVB
